Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x4000 "ALIEN-ARGUSPRESS-4000" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Alien (Argus Press Software).prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Made the following changes to allow the joystick button in port two to start the full game:
1. Patched the LDA $91, CMP #$FA instructions at $605F to be JSR $1000 instead 2. Added a small routine at $1000 to check the fire button in port 2 - if pressed, then it returns, which starts the full game. If not pressed, the routine then executes the LDA $91, CMP #$FA instructions and returns to carry on the normal code flow.
